creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to Martin Wilke from comment #2)
> Hi,
> 
> I am getting also a 404.
> 
> ===>  Found saved configuration for hesiod-3.2.1_2
> ===>   hesiod-3.2.1_2 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
> => hesiod-3.2.1.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /home/distfiles/.
> => Attempting to fetch
> http://BSDforge.com/projects/source/dns/hesiod/hesiod-3.2.1.tar.gz
> fetch: http://BSDforge.com/projects/source/dns/hesiod/hesiod-3.2.1.tar.gz:
> Not Found
> 
> Can you please recheck. Thanks

D'OH! Sorry, Martin.

It's a typo on the web server.

Fixed!

Sorry for the bother, and thanks for your time.

--Chris
